message:
bd-3y9i: document demo features in README

Add brief description of what the live demo includes:
- 80+ interactive examples
- Live editor
- Style studio
- Diagnostics panel
- Determinism checker

CI verification for the demo was already implemented in pages.yml
(post-deploy smoke check verifies HTTP 200 and content).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,8 @@ Terminal/web output from a single pipeline.
 
 **Live Demo:** <https://dicklesworthstone.github.io/frankenmermaid/>
 
+*80+ interactive examples, live editor, style studio, diagnostics panel, and determinism checker*
+
 ```bash
 curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenmermaid/main/install.sh" | bash
 ```
